prose: **Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged in 7 cycles with no warnings reported. HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap). Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpgtls3pw5/live.json`.
